contact.title: Manager - Data Science (Commercial Marketing Decision Science)

summary: Certified Financial Risk Manager (FRM) and Data Science Manager with 4+ years of expertise in commercial marketing decision science and predictive analytics in the financial services sector. Currently leading a team of 4 analysts, driving incremental revenue through advanced ML models and strategic customer targeting frameworks. I specialize in translating complex data problems for multiple stakeholders into actionable models and business strategies that drive growth.

experience.title: Manager - Data Science
experience.scope: Incremental spend and balance prediction models for customer targeting and acquisition across the US commercial portfolio
bullets: Led the end-to-end launch of an s-learner XGBoost incremental Balance Model, driving $15M in annual incremental revenue and improving targeting precision
Developed a custom GPT-based Feature Discovery solution, creating 10+ novel features to boost model performance for the high-spend decliners segment
Spearheaded adoption of a Google Cloud Platform model-building capability, acting as the platform champion for Commercial Marketing
Deployed 3 models on the new platform, achieving a 5x reduction in runtime with end-to-end platform testing

experience.title: Senior Analyst - Data Science
experience.scope: Predictive Response models for cross-sell/upgrade and Small Business Owner (SBO) Identification model for the US customer portfolio
bullets: Achieved a 19.5% lift in top-decile capture rate and a $1.45M revenue increase by unifying digital customer cross-sell and upgrade response models
Mentored 5+ analysts (including an intern securing a PPO) by developing an SOP with multiple approaches for response model unification across channels
Spearheaded the launch of the Gen 4 SBO model, driving 700K incremental SBOs and $7M revenue, increasing response rates by 1.8x

experience.title: Analyst - Data Science
experience.scope: Predictive Response models, Corporate Cross-sell, and Small Business Owner (SBO) Identification model for the US customer portfolio
bullets: Developed the Gen 1 model for piloting Commercial-to-Corporate Cross-sell, resulting in an estimated $8.7M revenue impact
Implemented a robust tiering structure for the Gen 3 SBO model, capturing 1.1M incremental SBOs and an estimated $11.7M revenue impact
Developed the first standalone Digital Commercial Supplementary model to achieve a 41.25% lift in capture rate and $18.54M revenue impact

experience.title: Machine Learning Intern
experience.scope: Applicant Ranking Prediction Model and a Validation Model with quantifiable metrics for a B2B Recruitment Consultant Network
bullets: Increased candidate ranking prediction accuracy to 85% by developing a dynamic XGBoost-based algorithm to provide relative candidate rankings
Reduced applicant screening time by 5x through K-Means, Spectral, and GMM clustering to group 1000+ similar applicants

projects.name: Modeling Super Bowl (Fraud Identification)
projects.scope: Mitigating label noise from incorrectly tagged fraud transactions degrading model performance (Internal Hackathon)
bullets: Developed a novel SVM-based anomaly detection framework on 4 transaction segments and dual thresholding to identify mislabelled fraud cases
Improved existing model performance by achieving a 1.6% GINI lift and 3.36% fraud coverage uplift with robust benchmarking (2nd runner up)

education.degree: Dual Degree (B.Tech Chemical Engineering & M.Tech Financial Engineering), Minor (Computer Science)
